prompt: An original dark-fantasy vanguard unit called Pack Warden: a rugged wolf-pack handler wearing beast-hide armor and fur trim, gripping a heavy handler's weapon, a bonded wolf-companion silhouette standing at their side, wilderness-worn gear, cel-shaded 2.5D anime/game production art, painterly textures, high readability, full-body, three-quarter hero framing, clear weapon and wolf-companion silhouette, wide grounded stance, solid earthy amber-brown rim lighting, isolated on a perfectly uniform solid #FF00FF magenta background, no shadow outside the base, no text, no logos, no watermark, no copyrighted character likeness, original design only.
